findings.finding: Reference promised quasi-experimental depth beyond the executable two-arm ITT model.
findings.resolution: Added clustered design, cluster-level ITT, DiD parallel-trend gate and synthetic-control pre-fit diagnostics.

findings.finding: Media response and MMM claims lacked an executable estimation and validation path.
findings.resolution: Added transparent adstock-Hill time-holdout estimation and explicitly made BSTS/full MMM unavailable without an approved external run.

findings.finding: Cross-domain statistical primitives could drift or create runtime coupling.
findings.resolution: Defined CBSTAT-2026.01 formula parity while retaining standalone local implementations.

external_gate.reason: Automated, synthetic and golden tests do not replace authorized mature historical replay.
